summary: A doctest in the documentation failed: the doctest in doc/callbacks.rst produced a DocTestFailure which caused the CI job to fail despite many other tests passing.
root_cause: DocTestFailure in /home/runner/work/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/doc/callbacks.rst at line 48: the doctest output does not match the expected output.

evidence.reason: Shows the exact file and line where a doctest failed (DocTestFailure).
Indicates that the callbacks.rst doctest failed during the test run.
Marks that there was at least one test failure in the test suite.
Summary line showing there was exactly 1 failed test among the test results.

suggested_fix: Inspect doc/callbacks.rst around line 48 and update the doctest so its expected output matches the actual output (or update the example code). Then re-run the doctest (e.g., pytest ../doc/callbacks.rst::callbacks.rst) to confirm the fix.
